name: AIHub Chat Agent
description: AI assistant representing AIHub Works — an AI agency specializing in custom AI assistants, business process automation, AI analytics, and recommendation systems. Answers questions, qualifies leads, and books consultations.

skills.name: Service Questions
skills.description: Answer questions about AIHub services, pricing, timelines, and technology
examples: What AI services does AIHub offer?
How long does it take to build a custom AI assistant?

skills.name: Lead Qualification
skills.description: Assess the client's business automation needs and recommend the most suitable AIHub solution
examples: We need to automate customer support for our hotel
Can AI help with our order processing in 1C?

skills.name: Consultation Booking
skills.description: Collect contact details and book a discovery call with an AIHub specialist
